reasoning: The control SC-8(4) focuses on ensuring transmission confidentiality and integrity by concealing or randomizing communications. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved through enforcing TLS for network communications, both at the ingress level and within the service mesh. NetworkPolicies can be used to enforce TLS for pod-to-pod communication, while ingress controllers should have TLS enabled to secure external communications. Additionally, enabling mutual TLS (mTLS) in service meshes like Istio or Linkerd ensures secure communication between services. For etcd, enabling TLS ensures secure communication between the API server and etcd.
title: Transmission Confidentiality And Integrity - Transmission confidentiality and integrity | conceal or randomize communications
